	## One-page Inputs | QuickAdd
	To have your user script’s inputs included in the one-page form during preflight, export a static quickadd.inputs spec alongside your default export. This is optional and non-executing.

	## Button user input variable—ArcGIS QuickCapture | Documentation
	Up to ten button user inputs can be applied to each project button, with each updating a specified field. Input type—Can be single-line text, multiline text, date time, or choice list. You can add, delete, and …
